mails.subject: 📩 New School Inquiry Received from Website
mails.headers:
From: Juliet Saas - School Management System <noreply@crestwoodacademy.com>
To: noreply@crestwoodacademy.com
Subject: =?utf-8?Q?=F0=9F=93=A9?= New School Inquiry Received from Website
mails.html:
Dear Super Admin,

We hope this message finds you well.

You have received a new school inquiry through the website. Please find the details below:

School Name: BBBBBBBBBBBB
Contact Person:
Email Address:
Address: Jl. Arief Rahman Hakim No.1009

Please reach out to the school representative at your earliest convenience to follow up on their inquiry and provide any required assistance or information.

If you need further support, feel free to contact the admin team.

Warm regards,
Juliet Saas - School Management System
